## Summary

请简要说明本次改动解决了什么问题。

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test / tooling
- [ ] Release / packaging

## Affected Areas

- [ ] `packages/core-sdk`
- [ ] `packages/product-sdk`
- [ ] `packages/runtime-sidecar`
- [ ] `hardware/meeting-device-firmware`
- [ ] `docs`
- [ ] `.github`

## Validation

- [ ] Ran relevant build or check commands
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets or internal-only endpoints were introduced

## Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed changed examples and scripts
- [ ] I kept public-facing paths and package metadata consistent
- [ ] I considered backward compatibility where applicable
